prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_parcel_request high_priority_field_unit_1)
(register_parcel_request secondary_field_unit_1)
(register_parcel_request irrigation_planner_1)
(register_parcel_request irrigation_planner_2)
(assign_request_to_source high_priority_field_unit_1 water_source_pump_1)
(assign_request_to_source secondary_field_unit_1 water_source_pump_2)
(assign_request_to_source irrigation_planner_1 water_source_pump_3)
(assign_request_to_timeslot high_priority_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(confirm_request_allocation high_priority_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_valve_to_request high_priority_field_unit_1 distribution_valve_1)
(claim_delivery_segment_high_priority high_priority_field_unit_1 delivery_segment_1 timeslot_1)
(commit_high_priority_claim high_priority_field_unit_1 delivery_segment_1 distribution_valve_1)
(release_valve_from_request high_priority_field_unit_1 distribution_valve_1)
(release_timeslot_from_request high_priority_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_request_to_timeslot secondary_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(confirm_request_allocation secondary_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_valve_to_request secondary_field_unit_1 distribution_valve_1)
(claim_delivery_node_secondary_priority secondary_field_unit_1 delivery_node_1 timeslot_1)
(commit_secondary_claim secondary_field_unit_1 delivery_node_1 distribution_valve_1)
(release_valve_from_request secondary_field_unit_1 distribution_valve_1)
(release_timeslot_from_request secondary_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_request_to_timeslot high_priority_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(assemble_allocation_record_full high_priority_field_unit_1 secondary_field_unit_1 delivery_segment_1 delivery_node_1 allocation_record_1)
(mark_record_for_validation allocation_record_1 high_priority_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(confirm_delivery_high_priority_unit high_priority_field_unit_1 allocation_record_1)
(confirm_delivery_secondary_unit secondary_field_unit_1 allocation_record_1)
(consume_contingency_and_record_delivery high_priority_field_unit_1 contingency_reserve_1 timeslot_1)
(execute_delivery_high_priority high_priority_field_unit_1 water_source_pump_1 contingency_reserve_1)
(release_timeslot_from_request high_priority_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_request_to_timeslot secondary_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(consume_contingency_and_record_delivery secondary_field_unit_1 contingency_reserve_1 timeslot_1)
(execute_delivery_secondary_priority secondary_field_unit_1 water_source_pump_2 contingency_reserve_1)
(release_timeslot_from_request secondary_field_unit_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_request_to_timeslot irrigation_planner_1 timeslot_1)
(confirm_request_allocation irrigation_planner_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_valve_to_request irrigation_planner_1 distribution_valve_1)
(assign_sensor_to_planner_and_record irrigation_planner_1 field_sensor_1 allocation_record_1)
(initialize_planner_authorization irrigation_planner_1 field_sensor_1 allocation_record_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_equipment_to_planner irrigation_planner_1 equipment_unit_pump_1)
(assign_equipment_prepare_planner irrigation_planner_1 equipment_unit_pump_1 distribution_valve_1 field_sensor_1 allocation_record_1)
(assign_quality_approval_to_planner irrigation_planner_1 quality_approval_1)
(apply_quality_approval_stage1 irrigation_planner_1 quality_approval_1 field_sensor_1 allocation_record_1)
(finalize_planner_preparation irrigation_planner_1)
(consume_contingency_and_record_delivery irrigation_planner_1 contingency_reserve_1 timeslot_1)
(execute_delivery_by_planner irrigation_planner_1 water_source_pump_3 contingency_reserve_1)
(release_timeslot_from_request irrigation_planner_1 timeslot_1)
(release_valve_from_request irrigation_planner_1 distribution_valve_1)
(release_equipment_from_planner irrigation_planner_1 equipment_unit_pump_1)
(release_quality_approval_from_planner irrigation_planner_1 quality_approval_1)
(assign_request_to_source irrigation_planner_2 water_source_pump_1)
(assign_request_to_timeslot irrigation_planner_2 timeslot_1)
(confirm_request_allocation irrigation_planner_2 timeslot_1)
(assign_valve_to_request irrigation_planner_2 distribution_valve_1)
(assign_sensor_to_planner_and_record irrigation_planner_2 field_sensor_2 allocation_record_1)
(initialize_planner_authorization irrigation_planner_2 field_sensor_2 allocation_record_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_equipment_to_planner irrigation_planner_2 equipment_unit_pump_1)
(assign_equipment_prepare_planner irrigation_planner_2 equipment_unit_pump_1 distribution_valve_1 field_sensor_2 allocation_record_1)
(assign_quality_approval_to_planner irrigation_planner_2 quality_approval_1)
(apply_quality_approval_stage1 irrigation_planner_2 quality_approval_1 field_sensor_2 allocation_record_1)
(finalize_planner_preparation irrigation_planner_2)
(consume_contingency_and_record_delivery irrigation_planner_2 contingency_reserve_1 timeslot_1)
(execute_delivery_by_planner irrigation_planner_2 water_source_pump_1 contingency_reserve_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem is an irrigation water allocation planning problem in PDDL. I need to output only the executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions, one per line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).


## Understanding Problem Context  
- The task involves creating an irrigation water allocation plan using PDDL.  
- The output must be a sequence of ground PDDL actions, each on a new line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).

## Identifying Key Objects and Goals  
- The system includes objects like high_priority_field_unit_1, secondary_field_unit_1, and irrigation planners (planner1, planner2), along with resources like pumps, valves, and sensors.  
- The goal is to fulfill allocations for high_priority_field_unit_1, secondary_field_unit_1, planner1, and planner2, starting with no initial entity allocations registered.  

## Analyzing Initial State  
- No parcel requests (high_priority_field_unit_1, secondary_field_unit_1, planner1, planner2) are registered initially, requiring registration as the first step.  
- Both high_priority_field_unit and secondary_priority_field_unit belong to priority_group_a, despite the name suggesting secondary is lower; irrigation planners are priority_group_b.  

## Examining Types and Priorities  
- Priority groups (a and b) are both subtypes of parcel_request, with high_priority_field_unit and secondary_priority_field_unit both under priority_group_a.  
- This setup seems odd given the naming, but the type definitions confirm both are priority_group_a, affecting allocation planning.

## Examining Resource Allocation  
- High_priority_field_unit_1 and secondary_field_unit_1 require specific actions to claim segments and nodes for allocation.  
- Entity_allocation_confirmed needs registration, source assignment, timeslot assignment, and confirm_request_allocation, with timeslot_1 being exclusive and shared among requests.  

## Analyzing Sequencing Needs  
- Timeslot_1 can only be assigned to one request at a time, requiring release_timeslot_from_request for others to use it later.  
- Valves are assigned after confirmation and can be released, suggesting a sequence of assign, use, and release for resource management.  

## Exploring Fulfillment Steps  
- Delivery_confirmed is crucial for both units and planners, with units needing committed, staged, and record assembled, while planners have multiple paths.  
- Consume_contingency_and_record_delivery requires delivery_confirmed, assigned_timeslot, and contingency_available, with contingency being exclusive.  

## Detailing Record Assembly  
- Assemble_allocation_record_full needs both high_priority and secondary units committed, staged, and with reserved segments/nodes, using available record_1.  
- Record assembly effects include the segment/node being reserved, making record_1 unavailable until finalized.  

## Considering Commitment Paths  
- Claim_delivery_segment_high_priority reserves segments for high_priority, requiring confirmation and timeslot, leading to commitment and staging.  
- Reserve_quota_high_priority is an alternative, committing and reserving quota, both paths ensuring segment/node readiness for fulfillment.

## Processing Unit Fulfillment  
- Consume_contingency_and_record_delivery for high_priority_field_unit_1 finalizes delivery, using contingency_reserve_1 and timeslot_1, making contingency unavailable.  
- Execute_delivery_high_priority fulfills high_priority_field_unit_1, freeing water_source_pump_1 and contingency_reserve_1, but timeslot_1 remains assigned.  

## Managing Timeslot Allocation  
- Release_timeslot_from_request frees timeslot_1 from high_priority_field_unit_1, making it available for secondary_field_unit_1.  
- Assign_request_to_timeslot assigns timeslot_1 to secondary_field_unit_1, enabling its fulfillment steps.  

## Completing Secondary Unit Fulfillment  
- Consume_contingency_and_record_delivery and execute_delivery_secondary_priority fulfill secondary_field_unit_1, using water_source_pump_2 and contingency_reserve_1.  
- Release_timeslot_from_request frees timeslot_1 from secondary_field_unit_1, completing unit fulfillment.  

## Initiating Planner Fulfillment  
- With units fulfilled, focus shifts to irrigation planners; planner1 has water_source_pump_3 reserved, but planner2 needs a source, assigned as water_source_pump_1.  
- Planners require timeslot assignment and confirmation, starting with assign_request_to_timeslot for irrigation_planner_1 using timeslot_1.  

## Confirming Planner Allocation  
- Confirm_request_allocation and assign_valve_to_request prepare irrigation_planner_1 for delivery, using timeslot_1 and distribution_valve_1.  
- Further steps are needed to achieve delivery_confirmed for planners, continuing the allocation process.

## Preparing Planner Fulfillment  
- Assign_sensor_to_planner_and_record links irrigation_planner_2 with field_sensor_2 and allocation_record_1.  
- Initialize_planner_authorization sets up irrigation_planner_2 with field_sensor_2, allocation_record_1, and timeslot_1 for further processing.  

## Equipping Planner Operations  
- Assign_equipment_to_planner allocates equipment_unit_pump_1 to irrigation_planner_2 for use.  
- Assign_equipment_prepare_planner configures irrigation_planner_2 with equipment_unit_pump_1, distribution_valve_1, field_sensor_2, and allocation_record_1.  

## Ensuring Quality and Finalization  
- Assign_quality_approval_to_planner and apply_quality_approval_stage1 ensure irrigation_planner_2 meets quality standards using quality_approval_1, field_sensor_2, and allocation_record_1.  
- Finalize_planner_preparation completes irrigation_planner_2’s setup, confirming dispatch and delivery without method authorization.  

## Executing Planner Delivery  
- Consume_contingency_planner_2 uses timeslot_1 and contingency_reserve_1 for delivery.  
- Execute_delivery_by_planner fulfills irrigation_planner_2 using water_source_pump_1 and contingency_reserve_1, then releases the timeslot.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
